name: testAddCompanyByFillRequiredFields
description: Company can be added by filling out required fields
descriptionHtml: Company can be added by filling out required fields

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Company can be added by filling out required fields

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: company creation success message is displayed
